description:
Product Specifications:

Basic information

Product Type:Single Box Product

Product Name:32.5" Dog Crate Furniture with Wheels for Small Dogs, Heavy Duty Dog Kennel Indoor with 2 Doors, Wooden Pet Cage End Table, Double-Doors Sturdy Metal Dog Cage for Anxiety Dog

Origin:China

Color:Brown

Material:Particle Board,Steel

Product size

Assembly Length (inches):32.50

Assembly Width (inches):22.10

Assembly Height (inches):27.90

Product Weight (lbs):50.50

Package size

Length (inches):36.41

Width (inches):28.34

Height (inches):5.90

Weight (lbs):55.11

Product features:

  • 【Assemble with Ease】 Inside Dimensions: 30.5"W x 20.1"D x 23.7"H, Overall Dimensions: 32.5"W x 22.1"D x 27.9"H. Choosing the right crate size is vital to ensure your dog’s safety and comfort.
  • 【Sturdy Structure】Heavy duty frame made of durable corrosion-resistant steel. The quality particle board and metal bars are strong enough to ensure that your naughty pup can be safe inside.
  • 【Safety Guaranteed】 The sliding latches on the front door and side door prevent the high anxiety dogs from opening the door and escaping.4 industrial casters, 2 of which have braking function. Easy to move to anywhere
  • 【Ventilation& Easy to Clean】 The dog kennel is surrounded by round bars, which provide good air circulation and visibility. Dogs can be very messy and can sometimes have accidents, just open the front doors or side door and clean it with a cloth.
  • 【Furniture-Style】This dog crate can be used as an elegant end table while providing a safe area for your furry friend. Furniture style is able to blend in and complement virtually any decor theme.
